$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Filter Base component
$description: The two-column panel that houses filter categories and their sub-options. Left column (189px) stacks Filter Items; right column (172px) stacks Filter Sub Items. Acts as a container — all internal row tokens are defined in filter-item.json and filter-sub-item.json.

width.description: Outer border around the two-column panel

border-radius.description: 12px — rounded corners on the filter panel container
